results.title: Can E20 petrol lead to claim rejection? Here's what ICICI Lombard says
results.description: Concerns over E20 petrol impacting insurance claims have been addressed by ICICI Lombard. The insurer clarified that motor insurance policies remain valid for vehicles using E20 fuel and claims won't be rejected solely based on fuel type. Admissibility depends on insured events, not the petrol blend used, aligning with India's push for greener fuels.

results.title: Operation Tiger In Maharashtra: Will Uddhav Thackeray's Sena Face Rebellion Again? Political Buzz Intensifies Amid UBT MPs' Meeting Shinde Camp Leaders
results.description: The alleged 'Operation Tiger' gained fresh attention after only four Shiv Sena UBT MPs attended Uddhav Thackeray's meeting physically, while the remaining members joined online. Reports have linked the development to rumours of defections to the Shinde faction. However, party leaders have dismissed the claims and asserted that their MPs remain firmly aligned.

results.description: The Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has opened the objection window for the SSC GD Constable Answer Key 2026. Candidates can challenge incorrect answers on the provisional key, response sheets, and question papers via the official SSC website until the deadline. A fee of Rs 50 per question applies for online submissions.

results.title: Andhra Pradesh revises Muharram school holiday schedule for 2026, schools to close on June 26
results.description: The Andhra Pradesh government has revised the Muharram school holiday schedule for 2026, shifting both optional and general holidays in line with updated lunar calendar calculations. As per G.O.Rt.No.1176 and G.O.Rt.No.1177 dated June 15, 2026, the optional holiday is moved from June 16 to June 25, while the general holiday shifts to June 26. The revision aligns 9th and 10th Muharram observance dates, ensuring schools follow an updated and synchronised holiday calendar across the state.
